description_long: This is a round, multi-layered cake covered entirely in a thick layer of white icing and generously coated with colorful rainbow sprinkles on all sides and the top. A large wedge has been cut out, revealing five distinct, vibrant layers of cake in yellow, orange, pink, blue, and green, separated by creamy white frosting. The interior is filled with a variety of spherical candies and sprinkles, creating a piñata-like effect. The cake sits on a thin, round, slightly reflective base, likely a cardboard cake board. The surface is highly textured due to the dense layer of sprinkles, giving it a festive and playful appearance. No candles or additional decorations are present, and the cake is not enclosed in any container.
description: A round, multi-layered cake with colorful sprinkles covering white icing and a piñata-style candy-filled center, displayed on a thin cake board.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cut-out wedge, revealing the colorful layered interior and candy-filled center.
description_view_1: Side view with the cut section partially visible, highlighting the dense sprinkle coating and the cake's round shape.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the uncut, fully sprinkled surface with no interior visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view, showing the cut-out section from a different perspective and the thick layer of sprinkles.
